examples: Our singing master Vishnu would sometimes chaff him: "Look here, Munshi, you'll be taking the bread out of our mouths at this rate!"
This shows that the Munshi was amenable to soft words; and in fact, whenever we wanted we could persuade him to write to the school authorities to excuse us from attendance.
Dr. Munshi put Ms. Goterch on a regimen of one insulin injection in the morning and oral medications at mealtimes.
The good news, Dr. Munshi said, was that she qualified to return to one injection a day, as part of a new study, called Simple.
Likewise, Kamran Munshi, chief technology officer of online real estate information service Terabitz, is talking even before his online real estate information service is let into the club.
